title: erythraea occidentalis
intro: Erythraea occidentalis, also known as Western red kidney bean trefoil or Erythraea, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Erythraea occidentalis include its ability to soothe gastrointestinal problems, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Erythraea occidentalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
